description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a soft, matte gray fabric with subtle brown piping along the seams, giving it a contemporary yet cozy appearance. The sofa features two large, plush back cushions and two loose throw pillows—one in matching gray and the other in a contrasting light beige. The armrests are wide, padded, and slightly flared, providing ample comfort and support. The base of the sofa is low and blocky, with short, recessed legs that are barely visible, contributing to a grounded and sturdy look. The back of the sofa is plain and fully upholstered, with the piping detail continuing around the edges. The overall design is inviting and suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, gray two-seater sofa with wide padded armrests, brown piping, and two loose throw pillows. The upholstery is matte and soft, with a sturdy, low-profile base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, two large back cushions, and two throw pillows—one gray, one beige—resting against the backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the arrangement of the throw pillows against the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, fully upholstered back with brown piping detail and the top edges of the back cushions visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the armrest profile and the throw pillows' placement from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and two loose throw pillows (one gray, one beige) on a single seat base; cushions are uniform in size and not attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests with a slightly flared profile, extending to the same height as the backrest, featuring brown piping along the seams.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs recessed at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of dark wood or plastic for a low-profile appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions; continuous and unsegmented, with brown piping detail.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a matte finish, accented by visible brown piping along the seams; no visible patterns or tufting.
